creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191218
Patch for py-send2trash to enable concurrent installations

Hello,

attached is a patch to enable concurrent installations with different Python flavors.

- added "concurrent" to USE_PYTHON
- bumped PORTREVISION to 1
- changed PORTVERSION to DISTVERSION

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1Ramd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
